title: Baby on Board Car Safety Sign, Yellow Triangle Warning Sticker with Cartoon Design (Blue)
features: SAFETY FIRST: High-visibility yellow triangle warning sign alerts other motorists about precious cargo, enhancing road safety awareness
DURABLE DESIGN: Weather-resistant vinyl material ensures long-lasting visibility and adherence in various weather conditions
CLEAR MESSAGE: Bold 'BABY ON BOARD' text combined with adorable cartoon illustration creates an eye-catching safety notification
EASY APPLICATION: Self-adhesive backing allows for quick installation on car windows, bumpers, or other smooth surfaces
PERFECT SIZE: Compact yet visible triangle design measures approximately 15 centimetres on each side for optimal visibility
description: Product description Alert fellow motorists to the precious cargo in your vehicle with this eye-catching 'Baby on Board' car safety sign. The bright yellow triangular design ensures high visibility, whilst the adorable cartoon baby illustration adds a charming touch. Featuring a cute baby face with a blue dummy/pacifier, this warning sticker effectively communicates the presence of an infant passenger. The bold black text 'BABY ON BOARD' stands out clearly against the yellow background, making it easily readable for other drivers. This decorative yet practical car decal helps promote cautious driving around your vehicle, potentially contributing to safer journeys for your little one. The sticker's playful design maintains its important safety message whilst adding a touch of personality to your vehicle's exterior. Perfect for new parents wanting to encourage additional care from nearby drivers whilst expressing their parental pride. Safety Warning Do not block the driver’s view. Place the sticker on the lower corner of the rear windshield, not in the middle. Avoid obstructing mirrors or cameras. If your car has a rear camera or defogger, ensure the sticker doesn’t interfere.
